title: MOWAERS / BAND Project Overview
description: Overview of the modular wearable health monitoring system, embedded architecture, detachable sensor ecosystem, and emergency response framework.

title: TECHLANCE Platform Overview
description: Introduction to the AI-powered engineering ecosystem for project management, collaboration, and intelligent engineering workflows.

title: Highlighter Bluetooth Speaker
description: Patent-oriented Bluetooth speaker product showcasing industrial design, internal architecture, and prototype development.

title: Paper Thin Speaker Demonstration
description: Experimental Flat Copper Winding (FCW) speaker prototype demonstrating ultra-thin electromagnetic speaker architecture.

title: Eco Industrial Park Prototype
description: Automatic PCB dismantling concept for sustainable electronic waste recovery and recycling automation.

title: Water Based Cooling Fridge
description: Improved thermoelectric refrigerator demonstrating water-assisted heat transfer for significantly better cooling performance.

title: Thermoelectric Mini Fridge
description: 45-liter dual-Peltier refrigerator prototype using forced-air cooling and thermoelectric refrigeration principles.

title: Mini CNC Plotter
description: DVD-drive-based CNC plotter capable of drawing G-code generated sketches and images using recycled hardware components.

title: Bluetooth Bug Device
description: Compact Bluetooth audio transmission project demonstrating wireless embedded communication concepts.

title: Portable MP3 Speaker
description: Compact portable MP3 speaker integrating Bluetooth audio playback, embedded electronics, and custom enclosure design.
